topic_ordering_notes: The script opens with a show welcome, moves into story setup and host dynamics, then hands off to the segment-manifest boundary.
opening_hook_notes: The opening starts from the listener-facing show premise rather than workflow metadata or item counts.
host_usefulness_notes: The second host asks clarifying questions and translates the practical implication of the workflow rule.
host_chemistry_notes: Host interaction is compact and conversational without unsupported banter.
runtime_scaling_notes: Two Artifact Topic units imply a short script; target duration is 90 seconds to give the setup and manifest handoff enough spoken room.
density_notes: The script covers both selected Artifact Topic units without adding unrelated Feed Items.
